testcase.failure:
C:\Python312\Lib\shutil.py:633: in _rmtree_unsafe os.unlink(fullname) E PermissionError: [WinError 32] The process cannot access the file because it is being used by another process: 'E:\\swarmauri_github\\tigrbl\\.tmp\\pytest-tmp\\tmpkvgzlbeu\\tigrbl-create-call-graph.sqlite3'
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: pkgs\core\tigrbl_tests\tests\perf\test_tigrbl_create_call_graph.py:151: in test_tigrbl_create_call_graph_250_ops payload = asyncio.run(_profile_create_call_graph(results_path=RESULTS_PATH)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Python312\Lib\asyncio\runners.py:194: in run return runner.run(main) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Python312\Lib\asyncio\runners.py:118: in run return self._loop.run_until_complete(task) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Python312\Lib\asyncio\base_events.py:687: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ pkgs\core\tigrbl_tests\tests\perf\test_tigrbl_create_call_graph.py:86: in _profile_create_call_graph with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp_dir: C:\Python312\Lib\tempfile.py:946: in __exit__ self.cleanup() C:\Python312\Lib\tempfile.py:950: in cleanup self._rmtree(self.name, ignore_errors=self._ignore_cleanup_errors) C:\Python312\Lib\tempfile.py:930: in _rmtree _shutil.rmtree(name, onexc=onexc) C:\Python312\Lib\shutil.py:781: in rmtree return _rmtree_unsafe(path, onexc) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ C:\Python312\Lib\shutil.py:635: in _rmtree_unsafe onexc(os.unlink, fullname, err) C:\Python312\Lib\tempfile.py:905: in onexc _os.unlink(path) E PermissionError: [WinError 32] The process cannot access the file because it is being used by another process: 'E:\\swarmauri_github\\tigrbl\\.tmp\\pytest-tmp\\tmpkvgzlbeu\\tigrbl-create-call-graph.sqlite3'
